6.2.5 Using the exec and the tcpSocket liveness probe types

livenessProbe:
    exec:
        command:
        - /usr/bin/healthcheck
    periodSeconds: 2
    timeoutSeconds: 1
    failureThreshold: 1

A single probe failure is enough to restart the container.
